records.title: Spectrum
records.summary: Spectrum is the central lending platform story connecting Shaw's current film campaign.
facts: Amplify, AI Advisor, and Insight must be positioned in relation to the central Spectrum story.
Unverified integration behavior must not be claimed.
sourceRefs: Confirmed Shaw portal design canon — Jul 23, 2026

records.title: Amplify

records.title: Insight

records.title: Films 2–4 form one Summit campaign loop
records.summary: Amplify, AI Advisor, and Insight must be planned and reviewed as one coordinated three-film loop.
facts: Every film must consider the other two.
Message hierarchy and visual continuity should support one central marketing strategy.
sourceRefs: Direct Third i campaign alignment instruction — Jul 23, 2026
